mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, flight_id, feedback_type, feedback_text, ai_analysis, confidence_score, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM user_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, flight_id, feedback_type, feedback_text, ai_analysis, confidence_score, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM user_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND feedback_type = #{feedbackType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, flight_id, feedback_type, feedback_text, ai_analysis, confidence_score, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM user_feedback WHERE flight_id = #{flightId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, flight_id, feedback_type, feedback_text, ai_analysis, confidence_score, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM user_feedback ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_feedback SET user_id = #{userId}, flight_id = #{flightId}, feedback_type = #{feedbackType}, feedback_text = #{feedbackText}, ai_analysis = #{aiAnalysis}, confidence_score = #{confidenceScore}, metadata = #{metadata}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT feedback_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY feedback_type
SELECT id, user_id, flight_id, feedback_type, feedback_text, ai_analysis, confidence_score, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM user_feedback ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
